data.description: CEREBRAS SYSTEMS IS SAID TO TARGET UP TO $4 BILLION IN US IPO
Trump: Oil price will come crashing down as soon as war over.

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Nektar Therapeutics (NASDAQ: NKTR) revealed that on April 20, 2026, the Organization and Compensation Committee of the company's Board of Directors approved non-qualified stock options. These options allow the purchase of 28,450 shares of Nektar's common stock.

data.title: RB Global Reports on Voting Results From the 2026 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: The Annual and Special Shareholders Meeting of RB Global, Inc. took place on April 30, 2026, in Westchester, Illinois. The Company, listed on NYSE and TSX under the symbol RBA, provided detailed information on all matters voted on during the meeting in its Proxy Statement dated March 19, 2026. This document is accessible on the Company's website. As per TSX regulations, further financial details can be found in the company's official filings.

data.title: Riverview Landscapes Acquires Giannini Landscaping & Holiday Lighting by Giannini, Establishing First Long Island Branch and Expanding Recurring Service Offerings
data.description: In Lindenhurst, New York, Riverview Landscapes ("Riverview") has acquired Giannini Landscaping and Holiday Lighting by Giannini, a top provider in commercial landscaping, holiday lighting, and snow management. This move marks Riverview's establishment of its initial branch on Long Island and is a notable advancement in its growth strategy across the Northeast. Giannini, founded in 1977 by Mitch Giannini, brings a wealth of experience and expertise to Riverview as they integrate their services.

data.title: NOVAGOLD Announces Date of Its 2026 Virtual  Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: NOVAGOLD RESOURCES INC. will convene its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders in Vancouver on May 14, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PDT. Shareholders will vote on electing Directors, appointing external auditors, and authorizing the Board to determine their remuneration. Discussions will include resolutions on equity-based compensation plans, advisory votes on executive compensation, and the frequency of future advisory votes. Chairman Dr. Thomas S. Kaplan will express views on gold and investment. CEO Greg Lang will present NOVAGOLD’s achievements in 2025 and forthcoming catalysts in 2026. The Company’s stocks are listed on NYSE American and TSX under the symbol NG.

data.title: CN Announces Election of Directors
data.description: On May 1, 2026, CN (TSX: CNR) (NYSE: CNI) disclosed that the director nominees outlined in the March 9, 2026 management information circular were successfully voted in as directors of CN. The outcome of the vote at CN's Annual Meeting of Shareholders, conducted through an online webcast, is provided below.

data.title: Equillium Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Equillium, Inc., a biotechnology company based in LA JOLLA, California, recently disclosed that on May 1, 2026, they awarded nonstatutory stock options for acquiring a total of 800,000 common shares to two new employees under Equillium’s 2024 Inducement Plan. This move was sanctioned by the Compensation Committee of Equillium’s Board of Directors as a crucial inducement for these employees’ employment, conforming to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Equillium, Inc. is recognized for its groundbreaking therapies aimed at combating severe autoimmune and inflammatory conditions, and it trades under the symbol EQ on the Nasdaq stock exchange.

data.title: Blueport Acquisition Ltd and SingAuto Inc Announce Business Combination Agreement to Create a Publicly Listed Company
data.description: Blueport Acquisition Ltd (Nasdaq: BPAC) and SingAuto Inc have agreed to merge, with the new holding company set to be listed on The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC upon completion of the business combination. SingAuto, a global leader in green cold-chain logistics technology for commercial electric vehicles, will be acquired by Blueport in a definitive agreement. The Proposed Transactions are subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals before finalization.
Google, Anthropic, Meta, Tesla, Intel and Nvidia representatives to meet with lawmakers - Axios

data.title: Essen Health Care Launches RADIN Health All-In-One RIS and PACS Cloud Platform
data.description: In Sheridan, Wyoming, on May 1, 2026, Essen Health Care revealed a groundbreaking development in their dedication to top-notch patient care and innovative medical services with the launch of RADIN Health. This marks a substantial investment by the company in enhancing healthcare services.

data.title: BidFTA Online Auctions Partners with Jacob's Trading Company to Bring Deep Discounts to the Twin Cities
data.description: In Hopkins, Minnesota, on May 1, 2026, renowned secondary market player Jacob's Trading Company has announced a collaboration with BidFTA Online Auctions to provide enhanced discount opportunities in the Twin Cities region. This venture will grant local customers access to online auctions and a variety of discounted products.

data.title: Tether's Q1 profit hits $1.04B with Treasury holdings at $141B, as stablecoin uptake grows in emerging markets.
data.description: The leading stablecoin issuer maintains a heavily concentrated balance sheet in US Treasuries, with stablecoin usage growing in emerging markets.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Announces U.S. Commercial Availability of NEREUS™ (tradipitant), the First New Pharmacologic Treatment for People with Motion Sickness in More Than 40 Years
data.description: NEREUS™, a product by Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: VNDA), can now be purchased directly through the website nereus.us. As of May 1, 2026, the company has made NEREUS™ (tradipitant) available for consumers nationwide in the United States. This product is specifically designed to prevent vomiting caused by various factors.

data.title: Natuzzi Filed Form 12B-25 for Late Filing of Form 20-F
data.description: In Bari, Italy, specifically in Santeramo in Colle, a company by the name of Natuzzi has recently submitted a Form 12B-25 due to a delay in filing their Form 20-F. This event reflects a procedural issue impacting the company's financial reporting, marking a significant development for Natuzzi and its stakeholders.

data.title: Stifel Declares Quarterly Common Stock Cash Dividend and Declares Preferred Stock Cash Dividend
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE: SF) declared a cash dividend of $0.34 per share for its common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. The announcement was made by the company's Board of Directors in St. Louis.

data.title: ORIC Pharmaceuticals Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In South San Francisco, California and San Diego, a clinical stage oncology company, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC), disclosed that on May 1, 2026, they awarded a combined 216,000 non-qualified stock options and 35,000 restricted stock units to four recently hired non-executive staff who joined the company in April 2026. This move is part of ORIC's focus on developing treatments addressing mechanisms of therapeutic resistance.

data.title: Cisco Schedules Conference Call for Q3 Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Cisco, a leading technology company (NASDAQ: CSCO), will be holding a conference call on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 1:30 PM PT, 4:30 PM ET, to disclose its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, ending on April 25, 2026. This announcement marks a significant update on the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Highland Opportunities and Income Fund Announces the Regular Monthly Distribution
data.description: On May 1, 2026, the Highland Opportunities and Income Fund (NYSE: HFRO) disclosed that it will be issuing a regular monthly distribution of $0.0385 per common stock share. This distribution is set to be paid out on May 29, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the company...

data.title: Forkardt Hardinge Welcomes Ramy Shatoot as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Elmira, New York, on May 1, 2026, Forkardt Hardinge, a top company specializing in workholding solutions and machine accessories, has named Ramy Shatoot as its new Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and board member. Shatoot's appointment marks a significant change in the company's leadership.
